description: CompositionOrange round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% recycled polyester, with a mesh back, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has dark orange polka dots and a black stripe along the sides and brand logo in grey on left chestFittingSlimWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron deisgn Do not dry clean Wear comfortable and look stylish at the same time in this orange t-shirt from nike. Engineered with Dri-fit technology, it wicks away sweat and keeps you fresh and dry all day. The mesh offers better ventilation, allowing your skin to breathe freely while you burn away those unwanted carbs. Team it with a smart pair of tracks or shorts and you're ready to hit the gym for that fantastically groomed look.
